items.title: Nebius Group (NBIS) Ends 5.4% Lower as $18-Billion Cloud Computing Deal Glow Fades
items.description: We recently published 10 Stocks Hammered Harder than Wall Street. Nebius Group NV (NASDAQ:NBIS) is one of the worst performers on Tuesday. Nebius Group dropped its share prices by 5.4 percent to close at $128.15 apiece as investors unloaded positions while in a wait-and-see mode for more catalysts to boost buying appetite. Investor enthusiasm appeared […]
